response.justification: The candidate lacks demonstrated experience in embedded systems, C programming for UNIX, Linux kernel modification, or network security technologies like MACsec, 802.1X, or switch firmware — all core requirements. Their background is predominantly in web, mobile, and full-stack development using JavaScript/TypeScript and DLang, with no evidence of embedded networking or security feature development.
strengths: Strong full-stack and open-source development experience
Demonstrated ability to learn and apply multiple languages and tools
Active contributor to developer education and tooling
concerns: No proven experience with C in embedded or UNIX environments
Lacks any mention of network security protocols or switch firmware development
No evidence of Linux kernel source-level modification or hardware control
